prompt: Preserve this exact studio worktable scene and its warm honey daylight grade, lived-in working details, and the small blue-and-white floral printed cotton. Real candid photograph of a working dressmaking atelier, 35mm film look, gentle grain, shallow depth of field, authentic imperfection. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Portrait framing. Add: a tumbling pile of cotton fabric bolts spilling across the worktable itself, one bolt unrolling a length of the floral printed cotton toward the camera, mixed with plain natural cotton bolts, looking like stock that just landed and is being unpacked.
